caption: A man with blonde hair wearing a dark navy blue t-shirt is seen in a small inset window on the left side of the screen, positioned in front of a decorated Christmas tree and a monitor. To his right, a large digital sports card dominates the view against a red and purple gradient background. The card features a football player wearing a red jersey with the number "76" and a red helmet. Legible text on the card includes "RG", "80", and the name "TEVEN JENKINS". A small logo is visible at the bottom of the card. Throughout the sequence, the man in the inset window speaks, with his facial expressions and mouth movements changing slightly across the frames. The football player's card remains static and centered on the right side of the screen, while the man continues to talk in his respective window.
